title: Matera featured in The Nilson Report
excerpt: Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, was interviewed by David Robertson and Chris Cantle of the Nilson Report to talk about Matera's success in Brazil.
body: Matera Co-Founder and CEO, Carlos Netto, was interviewed by David Robertson and Chris Cantle of the Nilson Report to talk about Matera's success in Brazil and plans to expand to the U.S. Read the article [here](https://nilsonreport.com/articles/instant-payments-software/).
